steps.t: The Warg prowls the highest tier in western Clovengap. Borghild has asked you to deal with a vicious Warg who blocks the army's progress.
Nakrovak is in eastern Clovengap. Nakrovak, a crystal-encrusted Warg, has asked you to listen to her tale.
Nakrovak's cubs are held prisoner in eastern Clovengap. With the Angmarim defeated, you should release the Warg cubs.
Nakrovak is in eastern Clovengap. You have freed Nakrovak's cubs. You should ensure they all made it back to her safely.
